title: glechoma teucriifolia
intro: Glechoma teucriifolia, also known as Creeping Charlie or Ground Ivy, is a perennial plant with small, round leaves and blue-purple flowers. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Glechoma teucriifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and alleviating symptoms of indigestion and irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Glechoma teucriifolia can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
